Formerly: PERS298M.

PERS283 Iranian Cinema (3 Credits)

Introduction to Iranian cinema, society, and culture. Taught in English. Cross-listed with: CINE283.

Credit Only Granted for. PERS283, CINE283 or FILM298B.

PERS298 Special Topics in Persian Studies (1-3 Credits) Special topic to be announced when course is offered. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
